device_name: Ethos Treatment Management (3.0); Ethos Treatment Planning (2.0)
intended_use: Ethos Treatment Management is used to manage and monitor radiation therapy treatment plans and sessions; it is intended to be used with a treatment planning system. Ethos Treatment Planning is used to
intended_use_full: Ethos Treatment Management is used to manage and monitor radiation therapy treatment plans and sessions; it is intended to be used with a treatment planning system. Ethos Treatment Planning is used to generate and modify radiation therapy treatment plans.
target_condition: Malignant or benign diseases for which radiation therapy is indicated (assorted tumors, brain cancer, lung cancer, breast cancer, liver cancer, pancreatic cancer, stomach cancer, adrenal cancer, bladder cancer, prostate cancer, cervical cancer, vaginal cancer, uterus cancer, rectal cancer, anal cancer, spinal cancer)
ground_truth: Human anatomy expert contours following RTOG clinical guidelines; single set of contours produced for each training image by clinical experts with significant experience in CT segmentation
other_metrics: DICE similarity coefficient used for contouring performance comparison; models required to produce contours needing minor or no adjustments in at least 80% of test cases
